The '''27th Hour Social Club''' was a five-star establishment on [[Elshandruu Pica]] owned and operated by [[Kina Margath]]. It was part of a complex of bars, casinos, and restaurants collectively known as [[Margath's on Elshandruu Pica]].

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Sair Yonka]] kept a suite on the 26th floor of this building.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
